mockRecipes.setupCode: const defaultProps = { layout: 'hierarchical' as const, nodeSize: 'medium' as const, onLayoutChange: vi.fn(), onNodeSizeChange: vi.fn(), onFitView: vi.fn(), onExport: vi.fn() };
mockRecipes.notes: Pure presentational component. No router, i18n, or store dependencies. Use plain render(), not renderWithProviders.

mocks.reason: App reads 'tih-onboarding-completed' from localStorage. Return 'true' to skip onboarding.

mockRecipes.notes: CRITICAL: App.tsx contains its own HashRouter. Do NOT wrap in MemoryRouter or renderWithProviders. Render with I18nextProvider only: render(<I18nextProvider i18n={i18n}><App /></I18nextProvider>)

imports: import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from 'vitest'

mocks.code: const { mockHandle } = vi.hoisted(() => ({ mockHandle: vi.fn() })); vi.mock('electron', () => ({ ipcMain: { handle: mockHandle } }));
mocks.reason: IMPORTANT: vi.mock factory is hoisted. Use vi.hoisted() to declare mocks that are referenced inside vi.mock factory.

mocks.code: const { mockLoadGlobal, mockSaveGlobal, mockLoadProject, mockSaveProject, mockLoadRecent } = vi.hoisted(() => ({ mockLoadGlobal: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue({}), mockSaveGlobal: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined), mockLoadProject: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(null), mockSaveProject: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined), mockLoadRecent: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue([]) })); vi.mock('../../../../src/main/services/settings-manager', () => ({ loadGlobalSettings: mockLoadGlobal, saveGlobalSettings: mockSaveGlobal, loadProjectSettings: mockLoadProject, saveProjectSettings: mockSaveProject, loadRecentProjects: mockLoadRecent }));
mocks.reason: Isolate IPC handler logic from filesystem. All 5 settings-manager functions need mocking.

mockRecipes.testPattern: Call registerSettingsHandlers(), then find each handler from mockHandle.mock.calls by channel name. Invoke the handler and verify it delegates to the correct settings-manager function.
mockRecipes.notes: Node.js environment. No jsdom needed. Follow the exact same pattern as tests/unit/main/ipc/project-handlers.test.ts.

recommendations.description: App, handleOnboardingComplete のテストを追加
